requirement_topic.en: Pakistan Public Chargers: IEC Type 2 and CCS2 Connector Route
requirement_topic.zh: 巴基斯坦公共充电：IEC Type 2和CCS2接口路径
requirement_topic.zht: 巴基斯坦公共充電：IEC Type 2和CCS2接口路徑

summary.en: NEPRA's public charging-station framework points public Level 2 charging to IEC 62196 Type 2 and public DC charging to CCS2. Current IEC connector evidence should identify IEC 62196-2:2025 for AC pin/contact-tube accessories and IEC 62196-3:2022 for DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, unless a project document calls up a different edition.
summary.zh: NEPRA公共充电站框架将公共二级充电指向IEC 62196 Type 2，将公共直流充电指向CCS2。现行IEC接口证据宜识别IEC 62196-2:2025用于交流插针/接触管附件，以及IEC 62196-3:2022用于直流和交直流车辆耦合器，除非项目文件指定其他版本。
summary.zht: NEPRA公共充電站框架將公共二級充電指向IEC 62196 Type 2，將公共直流充電指向CCS2。現行IEC接口證據宜識別IEC 62196-2:2025用於交流插針／接觸管附件，以及IEC 62196-3:2022用於直流和交直流車輛耦合器，除非項目文件指定其他版本。

standards_or_laws: NEPRA Regulatory Framework for Electric Vehicle Charging Stations

summary.en: China AC connector evidence commonly follows GB/T 20234.2-2015. China DC connector evidence commonly follows GB/T 20234.3-2023, with GB/T 20234.4-2023 relevant for China high-power DC designs. These GB/T routes are not the same physical and communication route as IEC Type 2 / CCS2 for Pakistan public chargers.
summary.zh: 中国交流接口证据通常依据GB/T 20234.2-2015。中国直流接口证据通常依据GB/T 20234.3-2023，GB/T 20234.4-2023与中国大功率直流设计相关。这些GB/T路径并不等同于巴基斯坦公共充电所需的IEC Type 2/CCS2物理和通信路径。
summary.zht: 中國交流接口證據通常依據GB/T 20234.2-2015。中國直流接口證據通常依據GB/T 20234.3-2023，GB/T 20234.4-2023與中國大功率直流設計相關。這些GB/T路徑並不等同於巴基斯坦公共充電所需的IEC Type 2／CCS2物理和通信路徑。

gap.en: Merge AC, DC, and high-power connector checks into one hardware-conversion workstream: connector geometry, gender, locking, pilot/proximity signalling, DC communication route, cable assemblies, labels, and charger software must match Type 2 or CCS2 evidence. Adapters or GB/T reports alone should not be treated as Pakistan CCS2 readiness.
gap.zh: 应将交流、直流和大功率接口核查合并为一个硬件转换工作流：接口几何、公母头、锁止、导引/接近信号、直流通信路径、电缆组件、标签和充电设备软件均须匹配Type 2或CCS2证据。不得仅凭转接头或GB/T报告视为已满足巴基斯坦CCS2准备状态。
gap.zht: 應將交流、直流和大功率接口核查合併為一個硬體轉換工作流：接口幾何、公母頭、鎖止、導引／接近信號、直流通信路徑、電纜組件、標籤和充電設備軟件均須匹配Type 2或CCS2證據。不得僅憑轉接頭或GB/T報告視為已滿足巴基斯坦CCS2準備狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for public EV charging stations where the NEPRA framework or project approval specifies Type 2 or CCS2; exact edition should be checked against project documents
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T connector conformity is China baseline evidence and does not equal IEC Type 2 / CCS2 conformity

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China GB/T connector package should not be marketed as Pakistan-ready public charging hardware without Type 2 or CCS2-specific design and evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 如无Type 2或CCS2专项设计和证据，不应将中国GB/T接口资料包宣传为可直接用于巴基斯坦公共充电的硬件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 如無Type 2或CCS2專項設計和證據，不應將中國GB/T接口資料包宣傳為可直接用於巴基斯坦公共充電的硬體。

requirement_topic.en: Installation Geometry, Cable Use, and IP Rating
requirement_topic.zh: 安装几何、电缆使用和IP防护等级
requirement_topic.zht: 安裝幾何、電纜使用和IP防護等級

summary.en: The NEPRA framework includes installation controls such as socket-outlet height, restrictions on extension cords or second supply leads, and IP expectations including minimum indoor and outdoor EVSE ratings.
summary.zh: NEPRA框架包括安装控制，例如供电插座高度、延长线或第二供电线限制，以及包括室内外EVSE最低等级在内的IP防护预期。
summary.zht: NEPRA框架包括安裝控制，例如供電插座高度、延長線或第二供電線限制，以及包括室內外EVSE最低等級在內的IP防護預期。

standards_or_laws: NEPRA Regulatory Framework for Electric Vehicle Charging Stations

summary.en: GB/T 18487.1-2023 and exact GB/T 20234.1-2023 / 20234.2-2015 / 20234.3-2023 / 20234.4-2023 evidence may cover product behavior and connector ratings, but they do not close Pakistan site geometry, extension-lead, weatherproofing, or post-installation inspection requirements.
summary.zh: GB/T 18487.1-2023以及准确GB/T 20234.1-2023/20234.2-2015/20234.3-2023/20234.4-2023证据可能覆盖产品行为和接口额定值，但不能覆盖巴基斯坦现场几何、延长线、防水防尘或安装后检查要求。
summary.zht: GB/T 18487.1-2023以及準確GB/T 20234.1-2023／20234.2-2015／20234.3-2023／20234.4-2023證據可能覆蓋產品行為和接口額定值，但不能覆蓋巴基斯坦現場幾何、延長線、防水防塵或安裝後檢查要求。

gap.en: Provide installation drawings, mounting heights, cable-reach calculations, cabinet and connector IP ratings, gland details, no-extension warnings, and inspection records separately from charger type-test reports.
gap.zh: 应独立于充电设备型式试验报告，提供安装图、安装高度、电缆可达范围计算、柜体和接口IP等级、格兰头细节、禁止延长线警示及检查记录。
gap.zht: 應獨立於充電設備型式試驗報告，提供安裝圖、安裝高度、電纜可達範圍計算、櫃體和接口IP等級、格蘭頭細節、禁止延長線警示及檢查記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for public EV charging-station installations where the NEPRA framework and utility or site inspection apply
mandatory_status.cn: China product reports must be mapped to Pakistan installation conditions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is incomplete without Pakistan site-installation, weatherproofing, and user-safety evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 如无巴基斯坦现场安装、防护等级和用户安全证据，仅转换接口并不完整。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 如無巴基斯坦現場安裝、防護等級和用戶安全證據，僅轉換接口並不完整。
